reviews.comment:
Fui a las 8.00. En el servi compras me atienden muy mal. Las facturas te las vende solo si desayunas ahí sentado o sea compras el café con leche. si querés factura te señalan con el dedo la panadería del frente, apenas emiten sonido para explicarte porque. En el playon ni siquiera me ofrecieron limpiarme el parabrisas o controlar el agua del auto. Cómo era la fiesta de la serenata cerraron todo el esfuerzo accionamiento y no me dejaron estacionar ni para ir al baño. Una vergüenza.

(Translated by Google)
I went at 8:00 a.m. The service at the grocery store was terrible. They only sell you the bills if you have breakfast sitting there, meaning you buy a coffee with milk. If you want a bill, they point at the bakery across the street, barely making a sound to explain why. At the parking lot, they didn't even offer to clean my windshield or check the water in my car. Since it was the serenade party, they shut down the entire driveway and wouldn't let me park even to go to the bathroom. Disgraceful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3723316147645973523/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzMkxMdVVREAE

reviews.comment:
Cómo siempre las estaciones de servicio son "no lugares".
Si bien esta queda en Cafayate, un lugar con fuerte identidad regional, la estación de servicio que queda sobre la mítica ruta 40 es igual a cualquier otra en cualquier punto del país.
Suele haber cola para cargar nafta.

(Translated by Google)
As always, gas stations are "non-places."

While this one is located in Cafayate, a place with a strong regional identity, the gas station on the legendary Route 40 is just like any other in the country.
There's usually a line to fill up.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3723316147645973523/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURza0thcGpnRRAB
